# Tasks — ios-ui-audit-p1-burndown

**Phase:** 2 (Tasks)
**Framework:** v7.8.2
**Work type:** Enhancement (4-phase: Tasks → Implement → Test → Merge)
**Parent:** ui-audit-baseline-burndown
**Audit source:** [`docs/design-system/ui-audit-baseline.md`](../../../docs/design-system/ui-audit-baseline.md) (regenerated by `make ui-audit-baseline`)

**Baseline at start:** 0 P0 + 103 P1 in 42 files (8 feature areas)
**Target:** 0 P0 + ~30 P1 (78% reduction — Option B strategy locked 2026-05-11)
**Strategy:** 2 cross-area PRs. PR-1 adds 4 new AppSize tokens + mass-substitutes ~72 findings. PR-2 closes DS-RAW-FONT-SHORTHAND (26) + DS-A11Y-BUTTON (6).

## Strategy revision (2026-05-11)

Initial plan was 5 area-bucketed PRs assuming "lightweight token substitution." Frequency analysis revealed:
- **44** (36 occurrences) = iOS HIG tap target — needs `AppSize.tapTarget` token
- **28** (16) = icon container — needs `AppSize.iconContainer` token (distinct from `iconBadge=26`)
- **80** (13) = inline field width — needs `AppSize.fieldWidthCompact` token
- **36** (7) = compact tap target — needs `AppSize.tapTargetCompact` token
- **23 remaining values** = unique design-specific heights (chart 180, modal 260, divider 50, etc.) — leave as honest "design-specific" P1s

Trying to tokenize every magic number forces inventing single-use tokens which inflates the design system. The honest move: add 4 tokens for genuinely-shared patterns, do mass-substitute, and document the long-tail 23 as known intentional design values.

**Decision matrix locked via /AskUserQuestion 2026-05-11:**
- Strategy: **Option B** (Tokens for high-frequency only, ~78% reduction)
- PR structure: **2 PRs cross-area** (tokens-first vs area-first)
- Risk tolerance: **Strict** (operator iOS simulator spot-check per PR before merge)

---

## Rules being burned down (per-rule complexity)

| Rule | Count | Avg complexity | Token used |
|---|---:|---|---|
| `DS-MAGIC-FRAME` | 62 | L (~5min) | Replace `.frame(width: N, height: N)` literals with `AppSpacing.*` tokens |
| `DS-RAW-FONT-SHORTHAND` | 26 | L (~5min) | Replace `.font(.title2)` / `.font(.body)` shorthand with `AppText.*` tokens |
| `DS-A11Y-BUTTON` | 6 | S (~15min) | Add `.accessibilityLabel(...)` to icon-only `Button` constructions |
| `DS-MAGIC-PADDING` | 6 | L (~5min) | Replace `.padding(N)` literals with `AppSpacing.*` tokens |

**Effort math:** 94 L × 5min + 6 S × 15min + 3 file × 30min overhead (refactor friction) = ~9-10 hours total.

---

## Bucket A — Shared area (PR-1)

**30 P1 across 8 files. Cross-cuts every screen. Biggest baseline reduction.**

| # | Task | Files | Dominant rule | Complexity | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **T1** | Burn down Shared/ReadinessCard.swift (11 findings) | `FitTracker/Views/Shared/ReadinessCard.swift` | DS-MAGIC-FRAME × 9 + DS-MAGIC-PADDING × 2 | L | Cross-screen card; verify visual on Home tab post-fix |
| **T2** | Burn down Shared/ManualBiometricEntry.swift (5 findings) | `FitTracker/Views/Shared/ManualBiometricEntry.swift` | DS-MAGIC-FRAME × 5 | L | Recovery flow entry sheet |
| **T3** | Burn down remaining Shared/ files (14 findings in 6 files) | `FitTracker/Views/Shared/*.swift` (excluding T1+T2 files) | DS-MAGIC-FRAME × ~13 + 1 other | L | SyncStatusIndicator + ChartUtilities + biometric subviews + misc |

**PR-1 total: 30 findings, ~2.5h, 8 files**

## Bucket F — Verification + closure (T25-T28)

| # | Task | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| **T25** | After each PR: regenerate `ui-audit-baseline.md` via `make ui-audit-baseline`, commit on the same PR | Keeps baseline + actual in sync |
| **T26** | After each PR: `xcodebuild build` + `xcodebuild test` pass | Hard gate |
| **T27** | After each PR: operator visual spot-check on iOS simulator for the touched screens | Catches token-substitution visual regressions |
| **T28** | After all 5 PRs merge: case study at `FT2/docs/case-studies/ios-ui-audit-p1-burndown-case-study.md` | Frontmatter must satisfy FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gate; parent-case-study cross-link to ui-audit-baseline-burndown |

---

## Summary

- **Total tasks:** 28 across 6 buckets (A-F)
- **Repository:** FitTracker2 only (no fitme-story touch)
- **Branch strategy:** isolated worktree at `/Volumes/DevSSD/FitTracker2-ios-p1` per v7.8.1 (chore/iOS UI work matches branch-isolation Mode B since it touches `FitTracker/Views/**` not `.claude/skills` infra; opt-out reason: standard SwiftUI dev — pure code change on existing files)
- **PR sequence:** PR-1 (Shared, 30 findings, 2.5h) → PR-2 (Training, 16, 1.5h) → PR-3 (Nutrition, 15, 2h) → PR-4 (Auth, 14, 2h) → PR-5 (bundled minor, 28, 2h)
- **Total estimated effort:** ~10h coding + 2h verification = 12h end-to-end
- **PR cadence:** 2 PRs/day at sustainable review velocity = 3 days minimum, 6 days realistic
- **Kill criteria:** net visual regression on critical-path screen → revert + investigate token

**Awaiting user approval to advance to Phase 4 (Implementation).**

Implementation will begin with PR-1 (Shared) since:
- 30 findings = biggest baseline drop per PR
- 83% L complexity = mechanical, low review burden
- Cross-cuts every screen (ReadinessCard touches Home + Training + Stats)
- Catches the most "DS-MAGIC-FRAME" usage which has the most baseline impact
